if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND i.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND i.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND i.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND i.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpPanelItem :: selectById */ i.* , pan.panel_nm AS panel_nm , lib.widget_nm AS widget_lib_nm , cd_wt.code_label AS widget_type_cd_nm FROM dp_panel_item i LEFT JOIN dp_panel pan ON pan.panel_id = i.panel_id LEFT JOIN dp_widget_lib lib ON lib.widget_lib_id = i.widget_lib_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_wt ON cd_wt.code_grp = 'WIDGET_TYPE' AND cd_wt.code_value = i.widget_type_cd WHERE i.panel_item_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpPanelItem :: selectList */ i.* , pan.panel_nm AS panel_nm , lib.widget_nm AS widget_lib_nm , cd_wt.code_label AS widget_type_cd_nm FROM dp_panel_item i LEFT JOIN dp_panel pan ON pan.panel_id = i.panel_id LEFT JOIN dp_widget_lib lib ON lib.widget_lib_id = i.widget_lib_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_wt ON cd_wt.code_grp = 'WIDGET_TYPE' AND cd_wt.code_value = i.widget_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpPanelItem :: selectPageList */ i.* , pan.panel_nm AS panel_nm , lib.widget_nm AS widget_lib_nm , cd_wt.code_label AS widget_type_cd_nm FROM dp_panel_item i LEFT JOIN dp_panel pan ON pan.panel_id = i.panel_id LEFT JOIN dp_widget_lib lib ON lib.widget_lib_id = i.widget_lib_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_wt ON cd_wt.code_grp = 'WIDGET_TYPE' AND cd_wt.code_value = i.widget_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(i.*) /* base.ec.dp :: DpPanelItem :: selectPageCount */ FROM dp_panel_item i
